curation_notes: Patch commit 5822f1b drops all RPC-style remoting (79 files deleted, Closes gh-27422). The vulnerability is in the HTTP invoker service exporters which use Java's ObjectInputStream.readObject() on untrusted HTTP request bodies without type filtering. Primary location is HttpInvokerServiceExporter.handleRequest() which delegates to RemoteInvocationSerializingExporter.doReadRemoteInvocation() for the actual unsafe deserialization. SimpleHttpInvokerServiceExporter is a sibling in the same directory with the identical pattern. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization is correct per CWE-502 and the advisory description.
